summary: Tested P0 features: Province/State Dropdowns, Cart Payment Options, Renewal History Tab. Backend: 14/15 pytest tests pass (1 skipped - test account locked from prior runs). Frontend: all features verified via Playwright. Province endpoint works correctly for Canada (13 provinces), USA (51 states), UK (empty). Signup shows dropdown for Canada and text input for Other. Portal loads with Renewal History section showing empty state. Cart shows both payment options (Bank Transfer + Card) even when gateways not configured, with 'Not available' labels.

minor.issue: test.super.a@iter109.test partner admin account is locked (429) from previous test runs. This is a test environment issue, not a code bug.

test_results.province_endpoint: 9/9 PASS - Canada/CA returns 13 provinces, USA/US returns 51 states, UK returns empty, Other returns empty, 422 for missing param, public endpoint
test_results.admin_login_regression: 3/4 PASS - Platform admin login, wrong password 401, partner admin SKIPPED (account locked from prior runs)
test_results.customer_login_regression: 3/3 PASS - Customer login success, access orders, access subscriptions
test_results.signup_province_dropdown: PASS - Shows Select dropdown for Canada by default; shows text Input for Other country
test_results.portal_renewal_history: PASS - data-testid='portal-renewal-history' present; empty state shows 'No renewal payments yet.'
test_results.cart_payment_options: PASS - Both payment-bank-option and payment-card-option data-testids present; both show 'Not available' with opacity-40 when gateways not configured
test_results.profile_page_load: PASS - Profile loads; country is locked (read-only), region shows text input for GB customer; dropdown logic confirmed correct from code review

critical_code_review_comments: Profile.tsx: Country is hardcoded as 'locked' (readOnly, disabled) for customers. Province dropdown will ONLY show if customer was originally registered with Canada/USA. Since country can't be changed in Profile, users registered with non-CA/US countries can never get province dropdown in Profile. This is acceptable by design if intentional.
Signup.tsx: Province dropdown uses api.get('/utils/provinces') - correct, matches backend /api/utils/provinces endpoint with /api prefix handled by api.ts.

Cart.tsx: Payment method logic uses ws.gocardless_enabled !== false and ws.stripe_enabled !== false. Both default to showing (since undefined !== false is true). When explicitly set to false, shows 'Not available'. This is correct behavior.
utils.py: Province data is static/hardcoded — no DB queries, no auth required. Good design for a lookup endpoint.

success_rate.backend: 93% (14/15 tests pass, 1 skipped due to account lockout)

seed_data_creation: No seed data created. Used existing test_cust3_iter111@test.local customer (test-iter109-a tenant).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Province endpoint at GET /api/utils/provinces?country_code=XXX is public and works correctly. test.super.a@iter109.test account is locked until 2026-02-26 21:00 UTC. Customer login uses login_type='customer' param. Customer test account: test_cust3_iter111@test.local / TestCustomer123! / partner_code=test-iter109-a. Platform admin: admin@automateaccounts.local / ChangeMe123! (no partner_code). Cart payment options always show both Bank Transfer and Card even when gateways disabled. Portal Renewal History section has data-testid='portal-renewal-history' and empty state data-testid='portal-renewal-history-empty'.
mocked_apis: Email sending - stored in email_outbox collection (status=MOCKED)
Zoho sync - stored in zoho_sync_logs collection (status='Not Sent', mocked=True)
